resources.string: Aeons of ash tremble above the sealed throne-world

The interstellar dust begins to shed from the dead planet before the sky understands why. One emerald optic opens in the dark, then ten thousand more, ranked beneath the weight of forgotten ages. Obsidian obelisks rise through the crust with the inevitability of verdicts. The young species nesting among our stars call themselves nations, empires, futures. They are squatters scratching names on a stolen floor. The true sovereigns have awakened.
